# LibreOffice qa/ Test Fixtures — Provenance

All files in this directory are sourced from the [LibreOffice core repository](https://github.com/LibreOffice/core) under the **Mozilla Public License 2.0 (MPL-2.0)**.

The full license text is available at https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/

## Spreadsheet fixtures (Tables)

| File | Source | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `cell-borders.xlsx` | `sc/qa/unit/data/xlsx/` | Cell border formatting round-trip |
| `TextColor.xlsx` | `sc/qa/unit/data/xlsx/` | Text/font color in cells |
| `TableStyleTest.xlsx` | `sc/qa/unit/data/xlsx/` | Table styles |
| `basic-cell-content.ods` | `sc/qa/unit/data/ods/` | ODS with basic cell values |
| `border.ods` | `sc/qa/unit/data/ods/` | ODS with cell borders |

## Presentation fixtures (Decks)

| File | Source | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `3columns.pptx` | `sd/qa/unit/data/pptx/` | PPTX with 3 text columns |
| `altdescription.pptx` | `sd/qa/unit/data/pptx/` | PPTX with alt text / descriptions |
| `ShapePlusImage.pptx` | `sd/qa/unit/data/pptx/` | PPTX with shapes + images |
| `NumberedList-12ab-ab-34.pptx` | `sd/qa/unit/data/pptx/` | PPTX with numbered list |
| `accent-color.pptx` | `sd/qa/unit/data/pptx/` | PPTX with accent colors |
| `background.odp` | `sd/qa/unit/data/odp/` | ODP with background properties |
| `16-9.odp` | `sd/qa/unit/data/odp/` | ODP 16:9 aspect ratio |
| `cellspan.odp` | `sd/qa/unit/data/odp/` | ODP with cell spans in tables |
| `closed-shapes.odp` | `sd/qa/unit/data/odp/` | ODP with closed polygon shapes |
